Farzapedia, personal wikipedia of Farza, good example following my Wiki LLM tweet.

I really like this approach to personalization in a number of ways, compared to "status quo" of an AI that allegedly gets better the more you use it or something:

1. Explicit. The memory artifact

Went to a party in SF and this dude comes up to me and asks the following questions within 60 seconds:

- what are you building?
- did you do YC? (when I said no, he said 'what? why not?')
- what is your revenue?

(Im not joking)

But yea in other news I just moved to SF 🤙 hi!

我想分享一个可能略有改进的版本，放在一个“想法文件”里。这个想法文件的核心在于，在如今的LLM（学习管理）智能体时代，分享具体的代码/应用已经不再那么必要，你只需要分享想法，对方的智能体就会根据你的具体需求进行定制和构建。

以下是想法的gist版本：https://t.co/fNqr7yq4xg

由于人工智能代理的强大功能，Peter Steinberger 提议将开源项目中的 PR 重新定义为“快速请求”。

Peter Steinberger 指出，人工智能代理可以实现大多数想法，因此无需提交代码生成的拉取请求，并建议将 PR 改为“快速请求”。
